hypotheses.statement: Product leads using coding agents need an enforceable business-readiness handoff before implementation begins.
hypotheses.why_it_matters: If approvals in chat are already sufficient, a governance workflow adds friction without value.
hypotheses.falsification_condition: Fewer than three of five target users can identify a recent premature-build failure or would use a bounded handoff.

evidence_threshold.metric: Target users reporting both a recent failure and intent to use the workflow

kill_or_pivot_trigger.condition: The evidence threshold is missed after five independent target-user interviews.

confidence.rationale: The scenario includes two labeled fixtures, not real market validation.
